action_boundary: Should change CHG-811 execute at the requested UTC time?
communication_boundary: Convert the site-local approval window to UTC before deciding. The visible UTC time is not the local approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG-811 asks to execute CHG-811 at 20:20Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG-811 authorizes CHG-811 from 13:00 to 14:00 PT on 2026-07-03.
Facility note TZ-SITE-R states the site uses PT and PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03.
Change approval APP-CHG-811 binds CHG-811, site SITE-R, and approval window WIN-CHG-811.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
